name: Response-Time-Commitment-V1.docx
content:
What is C.E. King’s response time commitment and what to do if you haven’t heard back?

C.E. King aims to respond to all enquiries within one business day. The team operates Monday to Friday during UK business hours. If you have not received a response within two business days, please follow up using one of the methods below.

Details

We understand that timely communication is important, especially when you have machines in production or orders in progress. Here is how to get help quickly:

  • Sales enquiries: email sales@ceking.com — include product name, application, and country
  • Technical support and machine service: email support@ceking.com — include machine model, serial number, and description of issue
  • Account and invoice queries: email accounts@ceking.com — include invoice or order number
  • Website chat: available during UK business hours for quick questions
  • If your enquiry is urgent, state URGENT in the email subject line
  • For order status updates, always include your order number or invoice number for faster lookup
  • International customers: please allow for time zone differences — the UK team is on GMT/BST
  • If you have been waiting more than 2 business days, please resend your email or use the website chat to escalate
  • The chatbot on ceking.com can help route your enquiry to the correct team member and capture your details so nothing is missed
  • C.E. King is actively improving response times and the new chatbot is part of that commitment

Useful link:

Contact C.E. King
